summary: Completed testing of Lee Vaakki Dhaba new features: real-time notifications, UPI payment, and WhatsApp confirmation. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend features implemented with minor WebSocket connectivity issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent 'No items found' display when menu should show items

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection to /ws/admin fails with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'
Cart items sometimes don't persist between page navigations

passed_tests: All 24 backend API endpoints working including new UPI payment endpoints
Admin dashboard loads with notification features
Sound toggle button visible and functional in admin dashboard
Admin dashboard tabs (overview, orders, menu, coupons) working
UPI payment option present in checkout page
UPI info message displays correctly when UPI selected
WhatsApp confirmation button present on order success page
Menu page loads and displays items (when data loads correctly)
Checkout page loads and displays payment options
Order placement triggers backend notification broadcast
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket connection issues for real-time admin notifications. The WebSocket endpoint exists but connections are failing. Also investigate intermittent menu loading issues.

success_percentage.backend: 100% (24/24 tests passed including new UPI payment endpoints)
